changeSet.author: Víctor Cañizares
changeSet.sql: UPDATE supply_partition_coefficient spc SET plant_id = plant_lookup.plant_id, sharing_agreement_id = sa.id FROM ( SELECT s.id AS supply_id, p.id AS plant_id FROM supplies s JOIN supplies plant_supply ON plant_supply.community_id = s.community_id JOIN plants p ON p.supply_id = plant_supply.id ) plant_lookup JOIN sharing_agreement sa ON sa.plant_id = plant_lookup.plant_id AND sa.name = '[phase-2d-migration] Synthetic agreement (pre-model coefficients)' WHERE spc.supply_id = plant_lookup.supply_id;

rollback.sql: UPDATE supply_partition_coefficient SET plant_id = NULL, sharing_agreement_id = NULL;
